resources.string: SkyTrace is a practical astronomy observation app for amateur astronomers. Locate celestial objects, track satellites, record observations, and verify asteroid candidates.
Your location is used to calculate accurate positions of stars, planets, and satellites in your local sky. Location data stays on your device and is never uploaded.
Camera access allows you to capture telescope images for observation records and asteroid candidate analysis.
Storage access is needed to load your telescope images for blink comparison and observation logs.
